message:
fix: strip submit_result section from reviewer prompt to prevent confusion

The reviewer subagent's system prompt included the subagent_base.md which says
"You MUST call submit_result when done" -- but submit_result is removed from
the reviewer's toolset (it must use approve/reject instead). This contradiction
caused the model to never call approve/reject in production despite the tools
being correctly in the API request.

Also caps reviewer MaxToolRoundsPerInput at 30 (was inheriting 200 from parent).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
